scripts.backend:spec: docker compose run --rm -e RAILS_ENV=test backend bash -lc "bundle exec rails db:prepare && bundle exec rspec spec"
scripts.backend:lint: docker compose run --rm --no-deps backend bundle exec rubocop
scripts.frontend:test: docker compose run --rm --no-deps frontend sh -lc "corepack enable && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm test -- --run"
scripts.frontend:lint: docker compose run --rm --no-deps frontend sh -lc "corepack enable && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm lint"
scripts.frontend:typecheck: docker compose run --rm --no-deps frontend sh -lc "corepack enable && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm typecheck"
